name: Feature request
about: Propose a concrete addition or change to the framework
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What concrete user problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the desired resource syntax, CLI behavior, or runtime behavior.

## Example

Show the API shape, YAML shape, or command flow you want.

## Tradeoffs

What complexity or compatibility cost does this add?
